goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 15:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '6 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'postcode'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 15:30 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on saturday and should go to london liverpool street
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 6 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get area and postcode
